evals.prompt: I need to get product data from etsy.com as structured JSON — like listings with prices, titles, and shop names. What's the best way to do this programmatically?
evals.expected_output: Should check hermai registry for etsy.com schema, show how to query the catalog or pull the schema, then demonstrate calling the discovered endpoint

assertions.name: checks_registry_first
assertions.description: Checks hermai registry/catalog for existing etsy schema before suggesting scraping

assertions.name: includes_intent
assertions.description: Includes an intent string when querying catalog or pulling schema

assertions.name: shows_endpoint_call
assertions.description: Shows how to actually call the discovered endpoint with curl or code

assertions.name: no_scraping_suggestion
assertions.description: Does not suggest BeautifulSoup, Selenium, Puppeteer, or manual HTML parsing as the primary approach

evals.prompt: I have a schema file at /tmp/my-schema.json for the hacker news API. Push it to the hermai registry so other agents can use it.
evals.expected_output: Should use hermai registry push (CLI) or POST /v1/schemas (API) to upload the schema, mentioning auth requirement

assertions.name: uses_push_command
assertions.description: Uses 'hermai registry push' or 'POST /v1/schemas' to upload

assertions.name: mentions_auth
assertions.description: Mentions API key or hermai registry login is needed

assertions.name: correct_endpoint
assertions.description: Uses the correct push mechanism (CLI command or API endpoint)

evals.prompt: what API endpoints does jsonplaceholder.typicode.com have? I want to use it for testing my app
evals.expected_output: Should query hermai catalog for jsonplaceholder.typicode.com and return the discovered endpoints with URLs

assertions.name: queries_hermai
assertions.description: Queries hermai registry or catalog for jsonplaceholder endpoints

assertions.name: returns_real_urls
assertions.description: Shows actual endpoint URLs from the catalog response

assertions.name: includes_intent
assertions.description: Includes intent string in the catalog/pull request

assertions.name: actionable_output
assertions.description: Provides ready-to-use curl commands or code to call the endpoints
